mapper.select: SELECT position_code FROM member_lane_profile WHERE member_id=#{memberId} AND preference_score>0 ORDER BY preference_score DESC, CASE position_code WHEN 'TOP' THEN 1 WHEN 'JUNGLE' THEN 2 WHEN 'MID' THEN 3 WHEN 'ADC' THEN 4 ELSE 5 END

SELECT position_code "positionCode", preference_score "preferenceScore", champion_count "championCount" FROM member_lane_profile WHERE member_id=#{memberId} ORDER BY CASE position_code WHEN 'TOP' THEN 1 WHEN 'JUNGLE' THEN 2 WHEN 'MID' THEN 3 WHEN 'ADC' THEN 4 ELSE 5 END
mapper.sql: SELECT m.*,COUNT(mp.match_player_id)::int match_count,COUNT(mp.match_player_id) FILTER(WHERE mp.win_yn)::int win_count,COUNT(mp.match_player_id) FILTER(WHERE NOT mp.win_yn)::int loss_count,COALESCE(ROUND(COUNT(mp.match_player_id) FILTER(WHERE mp.win_yn)*100.0/NULLIF(COUNT(mp.match_player_id),0),1),0) inhouse_win_rate FROM member m LEFT JOIN inhouse_match_player mp ON mp.member_id=m.member_id
mapper.select: WHERE m.active_yn=true GROUP BY m.member_id ORDER BY m.real_name

SELECT m.*, COUNT(mp.match_player_id)::int match_count, COUNT(mp.match_player_id) FILTER(WHERE mp.win_yn)::int win_count, COUNT(mp.match_player_id) FILTER(WHERE NOT mp.win_yn)::int loss_count, COALESCE(ROUND(COUNT(mp.match_player_id) FILTER(WHERE mp.win_yn)*100.0/NULLIF(COUNT(mp.match_player_id),0),1),0) inhouse_win_rate, ( SELECT mp2.champion_name FROM inhouse_match_player mp2 WHERE mp2.member_id=m.member_id AND mp2.champion_name IS NOT NULL AND BTRIM(mp2.champion_name)<>'' GROUP BY mp2.champion_name ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC,mp2.champion_name LIMIT 1 ) inhouse_most_champion FROM member m LEFT JOIN inhouse_match_player mp ON mp.member_id=m.member_id WHERE m.active_yn=true AND m.member_id IN #{id} GROUP BY m.member_id
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM member WHERE LOWER(game_name)=LOWER(#{gameName}) AND LOWER(tag_line)=LOWER(#{tagLine}) AND active_yn=true AND member_id!=#{excludeId}

SELECT m.member_id,m.real_name,m.game_name,m.tag_line,COUNT(*) match_count,COUNT(*) FILTER(WHERE mp.win_yn) win_count,ROUND(COUNT(*) FILTER(WHERE mp.win_yn)*100.0/COUNT(*),1) win_rate FROM member m JOIN inhouse_match_player mp ON mp.member_id=m.member_id JOIN inhouse_match im ON im.match_id=mp.match_id WHERE m.active_yn=true AND im.season_id=#{seasonId} GROUP BY m.member_id HAVING COUNT(*)>=3 ORDER BY win_rate DESC,match_count DESC LIMIT 3
mapper.update: UPDATE member SET puuid=#{puuid}, summoner_id=#{summonerId}, profile_icon_id=#{profileIconId}, summoner_level=#{summonerLevel}, solo_tier=CASE WHEN COALESCE(#{preserveManualTier},false) THEN solo_tier ELSE #{soloTier} END, solo_rank=CASE WHEN COALESCE(#{preserveManualTier},false) THEN solo_rank ELSE #{soloRank} END, solo_lp=CASE WHEN COALESCE(#{preserveManualTier},false) THEN solo_lp ELSE #{soloLp} END, manual_tier_yn=CASE WHEN COALESCE(#{preserveManualTier},false) THEN manual_tier_yn ELSE false END, recent_wins=#{recentWins}, recent_losses=#{recentLosses}, recent_win_rate=#{recentWinRate}, recent_avg_kills=#{recentAvgKills}, recent_avg_deaths=#{recentAvgDeaths}, recent_avg_assists=#{recentAvgAssists}, most_position=#{mostPosition}, balance_score=#{balanceScore}, riot_updated_at=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, updated_at=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE member_id=#{memberId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM member_champion_stat WHERE member_id=#{memberId} AND stat_scope='SOLO_RECENT'
mapper.select: SELECT champion_name,games,wins,rank_no,ROUND(wins*100.0/NULLIF(games,0),1) win_rate FROM member_champion_stat WHERE member_id=#{memberId} AND stat_scope='SOLO_RECENT' ORDER BY rank_no

SELECT p.champion_name,COUNT(*) games,COUNT(*) FILTER(WHERE p.win_yn) wins,ROUND(COUNT(*) FILTER(WHERE p.win_yn)*100.0/COUNT(*),1) win_rate FROM inhouse_match_player p JOIN inhouse_match im ON im.match_id=p.match_id WHERE p.member_id=#{memberId} AND COALESCE(p.champion_name,'')!='' AND im.season_id=#{seasonId} GROUP BY p.champion_name ORDER BY games DESC,wins DESC LIMIT 3

WITH mine AS (SELECT p.match_id,p.team_code,p.win_yn FROM inhouse_match_player p JOIN inhouse_match im ON im.match_id=p.match_id WHERE p.member_id=#{memberId} AND im.season_id=#{seasonId}) SELECT m.member_id,m.real_name,COUNT(*) games,COUNT(*) FILTER(WHERE x.win_yn) wins,ROUND(COUNT(*) FILTER(WHERE x.win_yn)*100.0/COUNT(*),1) win_rate FROM mine x JOIN inhouse_match_player p ON p.match_id=x.match_id AND p.team_code=x.team_code AND p.member_id!=#{memberId} JOIN member m ON m.member_id=p.member_id GROUP BY m.member_id,m.real_name HAVING COUNT(*)>=2 ORDER BY win_rate DESC,games DESC

WITH mine AS (SELECT p.match_id,p.team_code,p.win_yn FROM inhouse_match_player p JOIN inhouse_match im ON im.match_id=p.match_id WHERE p.member_id=#{memberId} AND im.season_id=#{seasonId}) SELECT m.member_id,m.real_name,COUNT(*) games,COUNT(*) FILTER(WHERE x.win_yn) wins,ROUND(COUNT(*) FILTER(WHERE x.win_yn)*100.0/COUNT(*),1) win_rate FROM mine x JOIN inhouse_match_player p ON p.match_id=x.match_id AND p.team_code!=x.team_code JOIN member m ON m.member_id=p.member_id GROUP BY m.member_id,m.real_name HAVING COUNT(*)>=2 ORDER BY win_rate DESC,games DESC

SELECT im.match_id,im.played_at,im.winner_team,p.team_code,p.position_code,p.champion_name,p.kills,p.deaths,p.assists,p.win_yn,p.mvp_yn,s.season_name FROM inhouse_match_player p JOIN inhouse_match im ON im.match_id=p.match_id LEFT JOIN season s ON s.season_id=im.season_id WHERE p.member_id=#{memberId} AND im.season_id=#{seasonId} ORDER BY im.played_at DESC LIMIT 5

SELECT COUNT(*) match_count,COUNT(*) FILTER(WHERE p.win_yn) win_count,COUNT(*) FILTER(WHERE NOT p.win_yn) loss_count,COALESCE(ROUND(COUNT(*) FILTER(WHERE p.win_yn)*100.0/NULLIF(COUNT(*),0),1),0) win_rate,COUNT(*) FILTER(WHERE p.mvp_yn) mvp_count,COALESCE(ROUND(AVG(p.kills),1),0) avg_kills,COALESCE(ROUND(AVG(p.deaths),1),0) avg_deaths,COALESCE(ROUND(AVG(p.assists),1),0) avg_assists,COALESCE(MAX(streak.win_streak),0) best_win_streak FROM inhouse_match_player p JOIN inhouse_match im ON im.match_id=p.match_id LEFT JOIN (SELECT member_id,MAX(cnt) win_streak FROM (SELECT member_id,grp,COUNT(*) cnt FROM (SELECT p2.member_id,p2.win_yn,SUM(CASE WHEN p2.win_yn THEN 0 ELSE 1 END) OVER(PARTITION BY p2.member_id ORDER BY im2.played_at,im2.match_id) grp FROM inhouse_match_player p2 JOIN inhouse_match im2 ON im2.match_id=p2.match_id WHERE im2.season_id=#{seasonId}) q WHERE win_yn GROUP BY member_id,grp) w GROUP BY member_id) streak ON streak.member_id=p.member_id WHERE p.member_id=#{memberId} AND im.season_id=#{seasonId} GROUP BY streak.win_streak
SELECT member_id "memberId", position_code "positionCode", champion_count "championCount" FROM member_lane_profile
SELECT match_id "matchId", winner_team "winnerTeam", played_at "playedAt" FROM inhouse_match ORDER BY played_at,match_id

SELECT match_id "matchId", member_id "memberId", team_code "teamCode", position_code "positionCode" FROM inhouse_match_player ORDER BY match_id, CASE team_code WHEN 'BLUE' THEN 1 ELSE 2 END, CASE position_code WHEN 'TOP' THEN 1 WHEN 'JUNGLE' THEN 2 WHEN 'MID' THEN 3 WHEN 'ADC' THEN 4 WHEN 'SUPPORT' THEN 5 ELSE 6 END
